claim: Schema verification confirms the 'scope' field is mandatory for all evidence records. The explorer correctly identified non-compliance in their own evidence (7 records missing scope). The cross-checker's evidence IS compliant (all 4 records include scope), but their recommendation to 'clarify' is insufficient given the clear schema requirement in the codebase.

evidence.summary: Agent protocol hard rule: 'Every evidence record must include scope: project, external, user, or unknown.'
evidenceScopeErrors function validates each evidence record has scope field with valid value, returns error message if missing or invalid
evidence.why: Validation implementation proving scope is required

evidence.summary: DEMAND_EVIDENCE_RESULT_SCHEMA fields definition states: 'evidence: Array of { path?, url?, line?, scope, source, summary, why } records. scope is project | external | user | unknown'
evidence.why: Schema definition showing scope is required field

evidence.summary: evidenceRecordsWithoutScope blocking function adds EVIDENCE_SCOPE_REQUIRED blocker when evidence records lack declared scope
Explorer's evidence records all lack scope field, only contain path, line, source, summary, why - 7 records non-compliant
evidence.why: Evidence of non-compliance in explorer result

evidence.summary: Cross-checker's evidence records all include scope field with value 'project' - 4 records compliant
evidence.why: Evidence that cross-checker knows to include scope field

evidence.summary: VALID_EVIDENCE_SCOPES constant defines valid scope values: new Set(['project', 'external', 'user', 'unknown'])
evidence.why: Shows the four valid scope values

risks: If evidence agents continue to omit scope field, schema validation will fail and evidence cannot be used for PRD readiness
If cross-checker's 'clarify' recommendation is followed, it may delay fixing the actual schema compliance issue
Downstream consumers of evidence results may fail when processing records without scope field
missing: Evidence of whether the harness automatically adds default scope='unknown' to records missing scope before blocking
Test cases specifically verifying EVIDENCE_SCOPE_REQUIRED blocker is raised for missing scope fields
Documentation on whether scope field requirement was added recently or has always been required

result.notes: Schema requirement IS clear from codebase: evidence-dispatch.ts line 271 explicitly states 'Every evidence record must include scope', validation function evidenceScopeErrors enforces this, and router.ts blocking mechanism adds EVIDENCE_SCOPE_REQUIRED blocker. Explorer correctly identified non-compliance (7 records missing scope). Cross-checker's evidence IS compliant (all 4 records include scope) but their 'clarify' recommendation underestimates the issue. The schema requirement is documented in the code the cross-checker claimed was missing. Block recommended because evidence records without scope cannot be properly categorized and the validation logic will reject them.
